title: Oren
compiled_truth: Oren is an external contact at [Ieor](companies/ieor). Over the corpus period (2000-08-08 to 2001-10-12), Oren sent 13 and received 17 emails, totalling 30 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (5), [Tyson](people/tyson-haas) (3), [Tom Campbell](people/tom-campbell-law) (3), [Shmuel](people/shmuel-euler) (3), [Willrichm](people/willrichm-aol) (3).
